decision: Deterministic enforcement behavior passed, but the live ASK/DENY activation gate remains pending because Claude Code hook-event stream evidence could not run under the current authentication state.
observations: npm.cmd run test:enforcement passed with 130 checks and 0 failures.
The deterministic suite covers E1-E7 ask/deny behavior and benign zero-false-positive corpus checks.
Live hook activation through a Claude stream was not accepted in this run.
